infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to scan rooms for Vastu analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location to provide accurate compass readings for Vastu directions.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Vastu360 to access your camera to scan rooms for Vastu analysis.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Vastu360 to use your location for accurate compass readings.
